{{Quote|We searched all afternoon and still no sign of the invaders' base. Nor their ship. Lumiya won't be pleased. She doesn't take failure well.|Rei|<ref name="marvel96" />}}
'''Rei''' was a [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] guard assigned to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady]] [[Lumiya]]'s base alongside [[Mendo]] and [[Taru]] on [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]], during the early days of the Nagai [[Nagai–Tof War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. While on guard duty in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Alliance of Free Planets]] infiltrator [[Kiro]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] Mendo while attempting to rescue a captive [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. Rei and Taru searched for their missing comrade, but were themselves surprised and slain.<ref name="marvel96" />
